root.rep_text: รายงานรับชำระพิเศษ ( เก่า )
root.sql:
select tm.* from ( select sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date, sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id,
sc_com_m_receipt.slip_no,
(select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) as s_item_amount,
(select sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'F') as s_item_amount_mode_f,
sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode, case sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode when 'F' then 'ชำระหนี้กองทุนค้ำประกัน' when 'R' then 'ชำระหนี้เก็บไม่ได้' else '' end as receipt_mode_des,
( select sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name ||' '||case sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode when 'F' then 'ชำระหนี้กองทุนค้ำประกัน' when 'R' then 'ชำระหนี้เก็บไม่ได้' else '' end as money_type_mode from sc_com_m_ucf_money_type where sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ) as money_type_name,
sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no, sc_com_m_receipt.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no||':'||(select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and (sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'FUN' or sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = 'MFEE' ) ) as fund_new, /*กองทุนใหม่*/ ( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type where sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'SHR' ) as by_share, /*ซื้อหุ้นพิเศษ*/
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type where sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'MFE' ) as fee, /*ค่าธรรมเนียมสมาชิก*/
0.00 as crem_amount, /*ฌาปนกิจ*/
(select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount),0)as dep from sc_com_m_receipt_item , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'DEP') as c_dep, /*เงินฝาก*/
sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id, /*ผู้บันทึก*/ sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'รก') and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as principal_amount_01,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'รก') and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as interest_amount_01,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as interest_amount_02,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as principal_amount_02,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as principal_amount_03,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as interest_amount_03,
( select nvl(count(sc_com_m_receipt_item.description),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'รก') and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as count_01,
( select nvl(count(sc_com_m_receipt_item.description),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as count_02,
( select nvl(count(sc_com_m_receipt_item.description),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as count_03,
(select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = 'FL') as free_amount
,(select mr.month_receive_month from sc_com_m_receipt mr where mr.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no) as receipt_month
,(select to_number(to_char(receipt_date ,'mm')) from sc_com_m_receipt mr where mr.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no) as month_receipt_date
--ส่วนสรุปหักเก็บไม่ได้-- ,( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'รก') and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as R_principal_amount_01,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'รก') and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as R_interest_amount_01,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as R_interest_amount_02,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as R_principal_amount_02,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as R_principal_amount_03,
( select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount),0) from sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule where sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode = 'R' and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) as R_interest_amount_03, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) as member_group_control_name
,(select nvl(sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount),0) as depe from sc_com_m_receipt_item , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type where sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item in ('ISR','ISP')) as ins /*ประกัน*/
,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_get_fee_add_realrec( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no , null ) as pay_add ,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_name ,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin ,sum(distinct sc_com_m_receipt.money_trans_return)as money_trans_return from sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type, sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,si_security_user ,sc_com_m_branch ,sc_fin_m_bank
where sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_com_m_receipt.member_group_no and sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin = sc_com_m_receipt.fin_bank and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' and si_security_user.user_id = sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id and sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id not in ( 'FUN' ) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.account_type = 'FBK' and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = 'TRB' and exists (select null from sc_com_m_receipt_item where sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 and receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no)
/*WHERE*/
group by sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode ,sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname ,sc_com_m_receipt.member_group_no ,sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.finance_date ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code ,sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_name ,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin ,sc_com_m_receipt.slip_no
order by sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_mode, sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no )tm

r_tnma_finance_payment_nest.sql:
select sc_com_m_receipt_item.description, sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ,sc_com_m_receipt_item.contact_status as loan_code ,decode(sc_com_m_receipt_item.contact_status,'1','P '||sc_com_m_receipt_item.description,sc_com_m_receipt_item.description) as description_new from sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = {1} and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ( 'รก') and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 and sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = {0} and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id not in ( 'FUN' ) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.account_type = 'FBK' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0'
order by sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no

r_ktm_receipt_payment_nest.sql:
SELECT tab_data.account_id, tab_data.account_name, tab_data.loan_type, tab_data.loan_type_description, tab_data.principal_amount, tab_data.interest_amount, tab_data.item_amount ,tab_data.loan_type_des ,tab_data.loan_code ,tab_data.bank_fin ,tab_data.bank_name ,( select nvl(sum( money_trans_return ),0) from sc_com_m_receipt , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status ='0' and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = {2} --and receipt_date = {0} and receipt_date between to_date('!receipt_date_1!','dd/mm/yyyy') and to_date('!receipt_date_2!','dd/mm/yyyy') ) as money_trans_return from ( /* เงินกู้ */ SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name as account_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description,
sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date ,(sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_type) as loan_type_des ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id as branch_id ,sc_com_m_receipt_item.contact_status as loan_code
,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin ,decode(sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin,'','เงินสด',sc_fin_m_bank.bank_name ) as bank_name FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_fin_m_bank WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( FPB_GET_KEEP_ACCOUNT_ID( 'ML' , sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no , sc_com_m_receipt_item.description , sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type , sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_code ) = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_com_m_receipt.fin_bank = sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin(+) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = {2} /*WHERE*/
/*and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = '20/1/2016'*/ GROUP BY sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_type ,sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id ,sc_com_m_receipt_item.contact_status ,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin ,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_name
union
SELECT sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id as account_id , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name as account_name , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id as loan_type , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name as loan_type_description ,
sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date
,' - ' as loan_type_des ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id as branch_id ,sc_com_m_receipt_item.contact_status as loan_code
,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin ,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_name FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type , sc_fin_m_bank WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item <> 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt.fin_bank = sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin(+) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = {2} /*WHERE*/ /*and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = '20/1/2016'*/ GROUP BY sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id ,sc_com_m_receipt_item.contact_status ,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin ,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_name ) tab_data , sc_fin_m_close_day ,sc_com_m_branch where sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = tab_data.receipt_date --and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = {0} and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date between to_date('!receipt_date_1!','dd/mm/yyyy') and to_date('!receipt_date_2!','dd/mm/yyyy')
and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_fin_m_close_day.branch_fin and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = tab_data.branch_id and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = {1} and tab_data.bank_fin = {3}

r_ktm_receipt_payment_nest_2.sql:
SELECT tab_data.account_id, tab_data.account_name, tab_data.loan_type, tab_data.loan_type_description, tab_data.principal_amount, tab_data.interest_amount, tab_data.item_amount ,tab_data.loan_type_des ,tab_data.loan_code ,( select nvl(sum( money_trans_return ),0) from sc_com_m_receipt , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status ='0' and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id --and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = {2} --and receipt_date = {0} and receipt_date between to_date('!receipt_date_1!','dd/mm/yyyy') and to_date('!receipt_date_2!','dd/mm/yyyy') ) as money_trans_return from ( /* เงินกู้ */ SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name as account_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description,
sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date ,(sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_type) as loan_type_des ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id as branch_id ,sc_com_m_receipt_item.contact_status as loan_code
FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( FPB_GET_KEEP_ACCOUNT_ID( 'ML' , sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no , sc_com_m_receipt_item.description , sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type , sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_code ) = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id not in ( 'FUN' ) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.account_type = 'FBK' --and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = {2} /*WHERE*/
/*and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = '20/1/2016'*/ GROUP BY sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_type ,sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id ,sc_com_m_receipt_item.contact_status
union
SELECT sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id as account_id , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name as account_name , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id as loan_type , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name as loan_type_description ,
sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date
,' - ' as loan_type_des ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id as branch_id ,sc_com_m_receipt_item.contact_status as loan_code
FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item <> 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id not in ( 'FUN' ) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.account_type = 'FBK' --and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = {2} /*WHERE*/ /*and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = '20/1/2016'*/ GROUP BY sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id ,sc_com_m_receipt_item.contact_status ) tab_data , sc_fin_m_close_day ,sc_com_m_branch where sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = tab_data.receipt_date --and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = {0} and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date between to_date('!receipt_date_1!','dd/mm/yyyy') and to_date('!receipt_date_2!','dd/mm/yyyy')
and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_fin_m_close_day.branch_fin and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = tab_data.branch_id and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = {1}

r_ktm_receipt_payment_nest3.sql:
SELECT tab_data.loan_type, tab_data.loan_type_description, tab_data.principal_amount, tab_data.interest_amount, tab_data.item_amount ,tab_data.loan_type_des ,tab_data.bank_fin ,( select nvl(sum( money_trans_return ),0) from sc_com_m_receipt , sc_com_m_ucf_money_type where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status ='0' and sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = {2} --and receipt_date = {0} and receipt_date between to_date('!receipt_date_1!','dd/mm/yyyy') and to_date('!receipt_date_2!','dd/mm/yyyy') ) as money_trans_return from ( /* เงินกู้ */ SELECT sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description,
sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date ,(sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_type) as loan_type_des ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id as branch_id ,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_lon_m_rule, --sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_fin_m_bank WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_com_m_receipt.fin_bank = sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin(+) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = {2} /*WHERE*/
/*and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = '20/1/2016'*/ GROUP BY sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date , sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_type ,sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id ,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin
union
SELECT sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id as loan_type , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name as loan_type_description ,
sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount, sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as item_amount , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date
,' - ' as loan_type_des ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id as branch_id ,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin
FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type , sc_fin_m_bank WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item <> 'LON' ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <> 0 ) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt.fin_bank = sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin(+) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = {2} /*WHERE*/ /*and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = '20/1/2016'*/ GROUP BY sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name , sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id ,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin ) tab_data , sc_fin_m_close_day ,sc_com_m_branch where sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = tab_data.receipt_date --and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = {0} and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date between to_date('!receipt_date_1!','dd/mm/yyyy') and to_date('!receipt_date_2!','dd/mm/yyyy')
and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_fin_m_close_day.branch_fin and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = tab_data.branch_id and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = {1} and tab_data.bank_fin = {3}

r_tnma_receipt_payment_lon_code_nest.sql:
select tab_data.loan_code ,tab_data.loan_code_desc ,tab_data.branch_id ,tab_data.receipt_date ,tab_data.principal_amount ,tab_data.interest_amount from (SELECT sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code as loan_code ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc as loan_code_desc ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id as branch_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date ,sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount ,sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount FROM sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_com_m_receipt_item ,sc_lon_m_rule ,sc_acc_m_account_master ,sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code WHERE (sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no) AND (sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type) AND (FPB_GET_KEEP_ACCOUNT_ID('ML', sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no, sc_com_m_receipt_item.description, sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type, sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_code) = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id) AND (sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id) AND (sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0') AND (sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON') AND (sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount <>0) and sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code AND sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id not in ( 'FUN' ) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.account_type = 'FBK' --and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = {2} /*WHERE*/ /*and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = '20/1/2016'*/ GROUP BY sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc ,sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date )tab_data , sc_fin_m_close_day ,sc_com_m_branch where sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = tab_data.receipt_date --and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = {0} and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date between to_date('!receipt_date_1!','dd/mm/yyyy') and to_date('!receipt_date_2!','dd/mm/yyyy')
and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_fin_m_close_day.branch_fin and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = tab_data.branch_id and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = {1}
